title: TAXII2
description: TAXII (Trusted Automated eXchange of Intelligence Information) is a transport protocol for sharing cyber threat intelligence. This generic TAXII2 connector for OpenCTI pulls STIX 2.x threat intelligence from any TAXII 2.0 or 2.1 compliant server. It supports importing one or more collections from a configured server, making it easy to integrate any TAXII-compatible threat feed or sharing platform into OpenCTI.
short_description: Generic connector to import STIX 2.x collections from any TAXII 2.0 or 2.1 compliant server into OpenCTI.
